LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT USAA CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE INSURED AND THE INSURER CANNOT BE JOINED AS DEFENDANTS IN THE SAME LAWSUIT. SEE GERACI VS. UNITED SERVICES AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION (1987) 188 CAL.APP. 3D 1245. (COUNSEL TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-29-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-29-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT USAA CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Nina J. Kim, of Daniels, Fine, Isael, Schonbuch & Lebovits, LLP, Appearing thru CourtCall for Defendant USAA Casualty Insurance Company and moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained without leave to amend. The insured and the insurer cannot be joined as defendants in the same lawsuit. See Geraci vs. United Services Automobile Association (1987) 188 Cal.App. 3d 1245. (Counsel to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
